hero.title: ZIAN
hero.lede: I design and build AI-native web apps, custom agents and rapid prototypes. Working software in weeks — not roadmaps in quarters.

manifesto.body: I'm Andre. A senior engineer with years of production software behind me, now focused on AI-native products and the agents that run inside them. The gap between an impressive prompt and a thing people actually use — that's where most teams get stuck. I don't get stuck.
signature: No JIRA queues that go nowhere.
You write me. I build the thing.
manifesto.kicker: Three weeks to a working prototype. Twelve to a shipped product. Those are the only timelines I work to.

items.title: AI-powered web apps
items.body: Full-stack products with LLMs at the core. Chat surfaces, generative tools, search that understands, agents that act. Built like real software — not demos.

items.title: Agents & workflow automation
items.body: Custom agents wired into your real systems. Slack, CRMs, internal APIs, browsers — anywhere there's a workflow, there's an agent that can run it.

items.title: RAG & knowledge systems
items.body: ChatGPT, but on your data. Built right. Retrieval that actually retrieves. Evaluations that prove it. Production-grade, not notebook-grade.

items.title: Prototypes in 1–3 weeks
items.body: An idea is cheap. A working version is the only thing worth arguing about. I build the version, fast — so you can decide for real.

process.title: Three weeks.
process.lede: A discovery sprint that ends with a working thing — not a deck.

steps.label: Week 01
steps.title: Frame the bet.
steps.body: We talk. I dig into the problem, the data, the user, the constraints. By Friday, you have a tight spec and a kill-criteria document. No spec — no build.

steps.label: Week 02
steps.title: Build the version.
steps.body: I build. You see daily progress. Working software, not slides. By Friday, a real prototype runs on real data — on a real URL you can share.

steps.label: Week 03
steps.title: Live with users.
steps.body: We put it in front of three real users. Their reactions decide what's next: ship it, refactor it, or kill it. No politics. No fake metrics.

contact.title: Tell me what
contact.lede: A short note works. I reply within 24 hours — usually faster.

form.name: Name
form.error: Something broke. Try again, or email me directly.
form.demo: Demo mode — set VITE_FORM_ENDPOINT in .env to receive real submissions.

consent.title: Privacy
consent.body: I use privacy-friendly analytics without cookies to see anonymously which content lands.

footer.tagline: AI products and prototypes — shipped fast.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.body: Placeholder — replace with your real details (per §5 TMG for Germany: name, address, contact, VAT-ID if applicable).

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Placeholder — replace with your real privacy policy (controller, hosting, contact form data, cookies, data subject rights).
